title: Adopt organization operating system direction for the next major version
mission: AOFを次のメジャーバージョンへ進化させる

baseline: v2.0 established installer/bootstrap and upgrade paths.
context.problem: AOF needs to demonstrate that the organization model can drive real version planning, not only exist as schema and documentation.

decision: Use AOF 2.1 itself to plan the next major version through requirements analysis, organization formation, team charters, contracts, council approval, roadmap, and release plan.

votes.rationale: The direction ties directly to user value: proving that AOF can operate as an organization system.
The plan respects the v2.1 model and does not assume runtime features not yet implemented.
The phased roadmap contains verification gates and defers autonomous runtime claims.

consequences: The next major version should be planned around organization operation, not agent execution alone.
Runtime enforcement, metrics automation, and backend-specific orchestration remain later phases unless explicitly scoped.
